name: helm-pilot
description: Open-source, self-hostable autonomous founder operating system

scripts.test:release: npm run typecheck && npm run build && npm test && npm run lint && npm run compose:config
scripts.lint: npm run format:check && npm run lint:tenancy && npm run lint:active-deploy
scripts.format: prettier --ignore-unknown --write package.json turbo.json .github/workflows/*.yml .github/ISSUE_TEMPLATE/bug_report.md README.md CHANGELOG.md docs/{degradation-matrix.md,env-reference.md,helm-integration.md,roadmap.md,runbook.md,security.md,self-hosting.md,spec/v1.md} infra/digitalocean/{README.md,cloud-init.yml,docker-compose.yml,deploy.sh,env.production.shared.example,env.production.helm.example,env.production.pilot.example,postgres/init-databases.sh} infra/monitoring/README.md .env.example packs/founder_ops.v1.json apps/web/src/app/launch/page.tsx packages/connectors/src/index.ts packages/helm-client/src/{client.ts,types.ts,receipts.ts} packages/shared/src/{sanitizers,llm}/**/*.ts packages/shared/src/__tests__/{owasp-llm-top10.test.ts,shared.test.ts} services/gateway/src/{index.ts,server.ts,routes/auth.ts,routes/launch.ts,middleware/auth.ts,middleware/rate-limit-pg.ts} services/gateway/src/__tests__/routes/{auth.test.ts,launch.test.ts} services/launch-engine/src/{index.ts,providers/digitalocean.ts,__tests__/launch-providers.test.ts} services/orchestrator/src/{agent-loop.ts,conductor.ts,index.ts,subagent-loop.ts,checkpoint.ts,__tests__/checkpoint.test.ts} packages/db/src/schema/{deploy.ts,tasking.ts} packages/db/migrations/0014_long_running_checkpoints.sql scripts/{certify-subagent.ts,check-active-deploy-targets.sh,install-skill.ts,rotate-telegram-webhook.ts,verify-schema.ts} e2e/tests/production-governance-smoke.spec.ts
scripts.format:check: prettier --ignore-unknown --check package.json turbo.json .github/workflows/*.yml .github/ISSUE_TEMPLATE/bug_report.md README.md CHANGELOG.md docs/{degradation-matrix.md,env-reference.md,helm-integration.md,roadmap.md,runbook.md,security.md,self-hosting.md,spec/v1.md} infra/digitalocean/{README.md,cloud-init.yml,docker-compose.yml,deploy.sh,env.production.shared.example,env.production.helm.example,env.production.pilot.example,postgres/init-databases.sh} infra/monitoring/README.md .env.example packs/founder_ops.v1.json apps/web/src/app/launch/page.tsx packages/connectors/src/index.ts packages/helm-client/src/{client.ts,types.ts,receipts.ts} packages/shared/src/{sanitizers,llm}/**/*.ts packages/shared/src/__tests__/{owasp-llm-top10.test.ts,shared.test.ts} services/gateway/src/{index.ts,server.ts,routes/auth.ts,routes/launch.ts,middleware/auth.ts,middleware/rate-limit-pg.ts} services/gateway/src/__tests__/routes/{auth.test.ts,launch.test.ts} services/launch-engine/src/{index.ts,providers/digitalocean.ts,__tests__/launch-providers.test.ts} services/orchestrator/src/{agent-loop.ts,conductor.ts,index.ts,subagent-loop.ts,checkpoint.ts,__tests__/checkpoint.test.ts} packages/db/src/schema/{deploy.ts,tasking.ts} packages/db/migrations/0014_long_running_checkpoints.sql scripts/{certify-subagent.ts,check-active-deploy-targets.sh,install-skill.ts,rotate-telegram-webhook.ts,verify-schema.ts} e2e/tests/production-governance-smoke.spec.ts
